labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 532281 ($252,177,348) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 532281 ($725,493,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

occupations.title: Laborers and Freight, Stock, and Material Movers, Hand
Mobile Heavy Equipment Mechanics, Except Engines
First-Line Supervisors of Retail Sales Workers
Bus and Truck Mechanics and Diesel Engine Specialists

n_band.derivation: margin 0.3000 (margins.json[532]: ESTIMATE: rental & leasing is asset-heavy with no clean Damodaran bucket (REITs 43.79% overstates operating rental); 30% chosen as a round mid-point before deriving results); revenue/employee $182,744 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 532281); class <5: 334 firms, avg revenue/firm $243,108 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $72,932 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 90 firms, avg revenue/firm $694,033 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $208,210 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 41 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,401,561 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $420,468 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 28 firms, avg revenue/firm $3,498,643 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,049,593 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 10 firms, avg revenue/firm $23,414,000 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $7,024,200 -> IN $1-10M band; n_band = 38
n_band.margin_source: ESTIMATE: rental & leasing is asset-heavy with no clean Damodaran bucket (REITs 43.79% overstates operating rental); 30% chosen as a round mid-point before deriving results
